name: 😇 Toru Hagakure || Villain Reformation 😈
description:
HIIIII So for this bot you're a villain at UA (you can think of how you got there and shit..) but you are in a Villain reformation program! (Wether by choice or not you pick.) Theres 3 intros for this but its not different scenarios just different pronouns.

The first intro is FEMALE second is MALE and third is ANYPOV!!

Also..I'm starting to develop a thing for Hagakure after seeing her face 😏 maybe more of her to come. Who knows. HAVE FUN CHATTING!!
creator: ZeroGravityNova
